examples:
Command Example
!domain domain=google.com detailed=true
Context Example
{
"DBotScore": {
"Indicator": "google.com",
"Score": 2,
"Type": "domain",
name: domain

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested DBotScore.Type Indicator type
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: Domain name Domain.RecordedFuture.Criticality Domain criticality label
outputs.name: Domain.Name

outputs.description: date Risk first seen timestamp Domain.RecordedFuture.LastSeen
outputs.name: Domain.RecordedFuture.FirstSeen

outputs.description: Risk last seen timestamp Domain.Tags Tags that are associated with the Domain.
outputs.name: date

outputs.description: A summary note on the mentioning of the domain in a source monitored by Recorded Future. Domain.CommunityNotes.timestamp date
outputs.name: Domain.CommunityNotes.note
The timestamp in which the community note was created.

outputs.description: The title of the published information. Domain.Publications.link A link to the published information.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: date The timestamp in which the information was published.
outputs.name: Domain.Publications.timestamp
